response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial drive through his founder role at GISCollective, he falls short of the Director-level AI strategy requirements. His background is primarily in full-stack web, GIS, and testing, with only recent, limited exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. He lacks the recognized AI leadership, advanced AI degree, and executive-level strategic advisory experience expected for this specialized Principal Engineer role.
strengths: Over 15 years of comprehensive software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and open-source development.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the Founder of GISCollective and through organizing public technical workshops.
Strong engineering craftsmanship with hands-on fluency in diverse tech stacks including TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and AWS.
concerns: Lacks the recognized industry expertise and deep, long-term background in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
Experience is aligned with hands-on Staff/Senior full-stack engineering rather than Director-level strategic advisory for enterprise customers.
Does not hold a preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
